enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual vlog while drunk and stoned on a Saturday in Boulder. He talks about his recent drinking, mistaking the day of the week, and the bike racer performance data project he has been working on.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Drinks occasionally and socially, had abstained most of the winter
Finds the data collection and analysis fascinating and is eager to see the results

transcript.text: Hello, living in the Boulder V-Log for the 26th of April, 2014.
I am, um, today is Saturday.
I'm kind of drunk right now.
I had three larger beers.
I don't know if there were 40 ounces.
I think there were 32.
Yeah, 32.
And, uh, I had six 3.2 margaritas, like, two nights ago that I got at the supermarket.
So, I've been drinking over, before that, I haven't been drinking much, though.
I got some beers when I went over to my mom's house a couple weeks ago, because my brothers were there.
Before that, I haven't been drinking all winter.
Ah, yes, I'm kind of drunk.
I'm stoned right now, too.
Um, so today was Saturday.
I thought today was Sunday, for some reason, because I didn't work on Friday or so.
I emailed my work buddies, and I was like, where's the work?
And they're like, today's Saturday.
Oh.
So, uh, yeah, it's cool to know I don't have to work tomorrow.
I've been working pretty hard all the last couple days.
Uh, I, I've been making this some bike racer level page.
I got all the data based off of what people have been saying on forums and stuff, but now I was like, wait, you should get the data off of, like, actual results and time trials.
So that's what I've been, uh, collecting now.
But I'm really looking forward to plugging that in and seeing how that goes into what I have before.
It's fascinating.
Plugging in all of the, uh, performances and stuff.
But I'll make a video about that later.
But that's what I've been working on all day long.
Um, so that's what I did today.
Got a couple of, uh, video requests.
Ooh, maybe I should do them.
Wasn't there other stuff I was going to talk about having to do with my life, where I am now?
But not that I can think of.
Okay, so that's that.
Wee.
Keeping up with the daily V-logs.
Peace out.
